/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/clock-widget.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/clock-widget.dir/clock-widget_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/clock-widget.dir/src/clock/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/clock-widget.dir/src/clock/ClockWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/clock-widget.dir/clock-widget_autogen/5RJMZTD3VX/qrc_clock.cpp.o" -o clock-widget  libshapedblur.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Svg.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6WindowSystem.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
